lenses.generalist: Search broadly for the simplest exact global rule and verify it across the full visible prefix.
lenses.deep_program_synthesis: Construct at least eight distinct compact generators spanning algebraic, recursive, procedural, phased, bounded-state, and interwoven explanations. Falsify them transition by transition and return only an exact suffix-predictive survivor.
lenses.deep_state_phase_forensics: Treat apparent irregularity as possible hidden state. Test bounded affine updates, phase-dependent transitions, variable-length procedures, and resets. Solve constants from repeated transitions and require an exact replay without exceptions.
lenses.deep_index_geometry: Change coordinates aggressively. Test residue-class streams, lag-indexed subsequences, segment number plus within-segment position, and finite-difference grids. Reweave the result and verify a late suffix before continuing.
